title: Among The Lilies

sections.label: Intro
lines: (A quiet longing, whispered in the dawn...)

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Where has my beloved gone?
Where does his heart now rest?
Like a river seeking the ocean,
I long for his love, nothing less.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: Among the lilies, where fragrance sways,
He walks in gardens, lost in praise.
His voice like dawn, breaking the night,
Oh, love, return, bring back the light.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: **I am my beloved’s, he is mine,**
**Set like the stars in love divine.**
**Through every shadow, I will roam,**
**For in his arms, my heart is home.**

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Fair as the moon, bright as the sun,
He shines where others fade.
A king among ten thousand souls,
Yet only for me was he made.

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: He calls me forth, he speaks my name,
Through winter’s chill, through summer’s flame.
In his garden, love runs free,
Boundless, fierce, eternally.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: **I am my beloved’s, he is mine,**
**Set like the stars in love divine.**
**Through every shadow, I will roam,**
**For in his arms, my heart is home.**

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Not all the kings, nor all the thrones,
Could steal this love my soul has known.
Not all the rivers, nor the sea,
Could drown the fire that burns in me.

sections.label: Final Chorus
lines: **I am my beloved’s, he is mine,**
**Set like the stars in love divine.**
**Through every valley, through every storm,**
**His love will hold, forever warm.**

sections.label: Outro
lines: (Among the lilies... love remains...)

lyricEyebrow: From the Book of Song of Songs
